gold_caption: A person in a red and black wetsuit is bending forward on a white board. | The person is balancing on the board in the middle of the water. | The board is floating on the surface of the river. | A person in a red and black wetsuit is kneeling on a white surfboard in the middle of a river. | The person is holding onto the sides of the surfboard. | The surfboard is floating on the calm water surface. | Dense green foliage lines the riverbank in the background. | A person in a wetsuit is standing in a river. | The person is bending forward at the waist. | The person is wearing a backpack. | The water reflects the surrounding green trees. | A person wearing a red top is bending over in the middle of the river.

output: <think>The person continues wading deeper into the river, moving further from the camera. They keep the large red and black backpack elevated above their head with both hands. The dark water reflects their blue shirt and the pack. Lush green trees fill the background along the riverbank.</think><answer></answer>

queries.question: What is the color combination of the backpack carried by the person? A. Blue and black B. Green and black C. Red and black D. Blue and green

answers.text: C
